title: BomEntry
description: One component entry in a pedal build manifest.

ref.description: Reference designator, e.g. R1, C3, Q1, RV1

description.description: Human-readable component description, e.g. Resistor, NPN transistor, Electrolytic capacitor

notes.description: Free-text notes about this component visible in the build manager

pos_x.description: X position of component center in mm, in board coordinate system (origin = board bottom-left after kicad-cli --page-size-mode 2)

pos_y.description: Y position of component center in mm, in board coordinate system

do_not_populate.description: True if this component is marked Do Not Populate in KiCad. Shown in BOM with DNP indicator.

exclude_from_bom.description: True if this component is marked Exclude From BOM. Still shown in footprint overlay but omitted from BOM panel.

installed.description: True if this component is pre-installed (derived from exclude_from_bom). Rendered on the board overlay in a non-interactive style; omitted from the BOM table.

ComponentOutline.description: Footprint bounding shape for rendering the clickable overlay in the build manager. Coordinates are relative to the component center (pos_x, pos_y); the webapp applies rotation via SVG transform.

type.description: bbox: axis-aligned rectangle. polygon: arbitrary courtyard polygon. svg: per-footprint SVG files from kicad-cli fp export.

bbox.description: Axis-aligned bounding box. For type=bbox, w/h are centered at origin (x=y=0 assumed). For type=svg, x/y give the top-left offset from the footprint origin (from courtyard viewBox).

x.description: X offset from footprint origin to bbox left edge (mm). Defaults to 0 (centered) for type=bbox.

y.description: Y offset from footprint origin to bbox top edge (mm). Defaults to 0 (centered) for type=bbox.

overlay_svg.description: Zip-relative path to overlay SVG (F.Courtyard+F.Cu+F.Mask). Present when type=svg.

fab_svg.description: Zip-relative path to fab layer SVG (F.Fab). Present when type=svg and F.Fab export succeeded.

courtyard_svg.description: Zip-relative path to courtyard-only SVG used for precise bbox extraction. Present when type=svg.

anchor_x.description: X position of the footprint origin within the overlay SVG (mm). Derived from board bounding-box centre offset. Falls back to vb_w/2 when absent.

anchor_y.description: Y position of the footprint origin within the overlay SVG (mm). Derived from board bounding-box centre offset. Falls back to vb_h/2 when absent.

points.description: Polygon points relative to component center. Present when type=polygon.

x.description: X offset from component center in mm

y.description: Y offset from component center in mm
